basics.name: Wei-Tung Lin
basics.label: Visiting Researcher at KAIST Visual AI Group | Computer Science M.S. Student at NTUST
basics.summary: I am Wei-Tung Lin, a M.S. student at NTUST under the supervision of Prof. Kai-Lung Hua. I'm currently an exchange student at KAIST, also vistor at Visual AI Group. I received my B.S degree in Computer Science at NTUST in Jan. 2023. Committed to the field of Computer Vision Deep Learning.

publications.name: PixMamba: Leveraging State Space Models in a Dual-Level Architecture for Underwater Image Enhancement
publications.authors: Wei-Tung Lin, Yong-Xiang Lin, Jyun-Wei Chen, Kai-Lung Hua
publications.summary: Proposed a novel dual-level architecture for underwater image enhancement, which leverages state space models to enhance the performance of the model.

work.name: Prof. Kai-Lung Hua Lab, National Taiwan University of Science and Technology
work.summary: Work on several NSTC projects and industry collaborations in deep learning, including computer vision, multi-modal learning, and autonomous driving.
highlights: Designed and enhanced Multi-modal Perception Module for Autonomous Vehicles
Developed deep learning models for Event Cameras and Motion Vector Sensors
Contributed to multi-sensor intergration with deep learning for Level-2 Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) features development at MICROMAX

work.name: Heroic Faith
work.summary: Engineered ETL (data pipeline) and implemented CI/CD workflows.
highlights: Developed end-to-end data pipeline using Apache Airflow
Implemented GitLab CI/CD for build and test automation

education.institution: National Taiwan University of Science and Technology
National Taiwan University of Science and Technology
